# Career and Workforce Readiness {#career-workforce}

:::cdi-message
- **ID:** AI-012
- **Type:** Workforce Chapter
- **Audience:** Learners, mentors, and professionals
- **Theme:** AI readiness is now part of career readiness
:::


AI readiness does not mean everyone must become an AI engineer.

It means learners and professionals should understand how to work with AI tools responsibly in their own domain.

## Practical Career Capabilities

```text
AI literacy
problem framing
prompt and context design
verification
workflow documentation
communication
ethical judgment
continuous learning
```
